title: Old HMI Items
description: Replaces HMI's new 3D items with Minecraft's default 2D items.
body:
This resource pack replaces [HMI](https://modrinth.com/mod/hold-my-items)'s new 3D items with Minecraft's default 2D items look, which was in older HMI versions.
![Water bucket comparison](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2c7494cefcc3827c7628db1b77777f6f989b792b_0.webp)
## Important Note!
If you want this resource pack to work, replace it with your Example HMI pack or place it on top of it in your Minecraft's resource packs menu.

The only downside of this resource pack is that it doesn't change the models of block items when held.
![Example of not changing block models](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a886acd44f1ef7e23fc2295578ba7b3303958ab9_0.webp)
